For more than a century, the Institut Pasteur has led The Institut Pasteur is an internationally renowned center for biomedical research that stands out in many disciplines. The Institut Pasteur and its International Network are putting their scientific expertise to work for the health of populations and individuals. Knowledge transfer is one of the Institut Pasteur’s core missions.

It demonstrates its unwavering commitment to society. Innovation development and technology transfer are promoted by the Institut Pasteur through its multidisciplinary and transversal approach to research.
